channel.title: Redmi Turbo 4 Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.6.0.WOLEUXM Fastboot update for POCO F7 EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO F7 EEA

Codename: onyx

Version: OS3.0.6.0.WOLEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.8 GB

MD5: f77f0ad376613c5ddd36a8ca9e391d43

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to April 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
